title: PHP Associative Arrays
codeExample:
101, "name" => "Laptop", "price" => 999.99, "in_stock" => true ]; echo "Product: " . $product["name"] . "
"; echo "Price: $" . $product["price"] . "
"; // Check if key exists if (array_key_exists("discount", $product)) { echo "Discount available"; } else { $product["discount"] = 0; echo "Discount set to 0"; } // List all keys print_r(array_keys($product)); ?>

quiz.question: What type of keys do associative arrays use?
How do you check if a key exists in an associative array?
